## Title

Book Available Courts

## User Story

**As a** customer

**I want** to book available courts

**So that** I can reserve facilities without hassle

## Story Points

[5]

## Tasks

- [ ] Display available courts
- [ ] Implement booking system
- [ ] Validate time slots

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Users can book courts
- [ ] Booking confirmation is immediate

## Given / When / Then

**Given** a court is available,

**when**  the user books it,

**then** the reservation is confirmed

## Validation and Evidence

**Validation method**
Booking test

**Related repository evidence**
docs/booking.md
